description_long: This is a modern three-seater sofa featuring a sturdy wooden frame with a rich, natural wood grain visible on the sides and back. The seating area is outfitted with three thick, plush seat cushions and three large, loose backrest cushions, all upholstered in a vibrant lavender fabric. The armrests are straight, flat, and extend slightly above the seat level, matching the wood finish of the frame. The sofa stands on four short, block-style legs, also made of wood, providing stability and a slight elevation from the ground. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with a focus on comfort and visual contrast between the soft cushions and the hard wooden structure. This piece would be suitable for outdoor urban lounges, parks, or modern public waiting areas.
description: A contemporary wooden-framed sofa with lavender cushions, featuring three plush seat and back cushions and straight wooden armrests. The design combines comfort with a modern, clean aesthetic.
description_view_0: Front view showing three large lavender back cushions, three seat cushions, and straight wooden armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sofa's depth, the thickness of the cushions, and the solid wooden armrest and leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous wooden back panel with visible wood grain and the tops of the back cushions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the other side, showing the profile of the cushions and wooden armrest.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three individual, loose seat cushions and three large, loose back cushions, all uniform in size and evenly spaced.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, flat wooden armrests at seat height, extending slightly above the seat with a boxy, minimalist profile and no visible padding.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, block-style wooden legs positioned at each corner, exposed and matching the frame's wood grain.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight backrest formed by three large, loose cushions resting against a continuous wooden back panel.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid lavender fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible decorative stitching or pattern.
